calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jul-10-2006 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jul-10-2006 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge for Court Trial Prove-Up.
Dept. 218, VJ. Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Beldon Yee.
Joseph Sacramento, Esq. for Plaintiff: Ed Litke.
Plaintiff's Witness/Property Manager: Dolores Malatag, and Carlos Garcia, were sworn and direct examined.
No appearance by the Defendant: William Bennett.
Exhibit 1 - Rental Agreement----------------------------ID/EVID
Exhibit 2 - Three-day Notice----------------------------ID/EVID
Exhibit 3 - Declartion of Amended Three-day Notice------ID/EVID
After hearing the tetimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant: William Bennett as follows:
Restitution and Possession of the property located at 1950 Cabrillo St., #7, San Francisco.
Back-Rent and Damages $3,833.20
Costs $275.78, for a total of $4,108.98
Counsel stipulated for the return of the Exhibits in open court.
Judgment signed in open court.

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-06-2006 Off Calendar
